name: crabtalk-professional-seo-8-pages-fixed
description: Professional Crab Talk static website with 8 SEO subpages.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R index.html sitemap.xml robots.txt favicon.ico favicon-16x16.png favicon-32x32.png favicon-192x192.png apple-touch-icon.png live-seafood-singapore live-crabs-singapore roe-crab-singapore australian-rock-lobster-singapore alaskan-king-crab-singapore oysters-shellfish-singapore soon-hock-singapore fai-kee-collaboration dist/ && if [ -d public ]; then cp -R public/* dist/; fi
